title: TAT-3168: Market detail category search shortcut (v1, press-only, post-main-merge)
description: Proves the magnifying-glass shortcut on the BTC market detail header opens the Markets list (Crypto pre-selected) and returns on back. Drives the app with manifest-declared ui.press/ui.wait_for + visible testIDs only; ui.navigate is NOT used because main removed the in-app agentic bridge (get-route) the mobile runner depends on. Category resolution is delegated to @metamask/perps-controller v8 getMarketTypeFilter (unit-tested). Start state: wallet home (WalletView), unlocked.

status.intent: Confirm runner is connected to the mobile app

open-perps.intent: Open Perps from the wallet homepage

wait-perps-home.intent: Wait for the Perps home screen

open-btc-detail.intent: Open the BTC market detail from the perps home markets list (clean stack, no market-list screen)

ac1-wait-icon.intent: AC1/AC5: magnifying glass icon is visible on the BTC detail header

ac1-screenshot.intent: AC1: capture search icon visible on BTC detail header

ac2-wait-list.intent: AC2: Markets list opens after tapping search (Crypto pre-selected for BTC)

ac2-screenshot.intent: AC2: capture Markets list opened with Crypto category from the BTC shortcut

ac4-press-back.intent: AC4: tap back from the Markets list

ac4-wait-return.intent: AC4: returns to the originating BTC market detail (header search icon present again)

ac4-screenshot.intent: AC4: capture return to BTC market detail
